choices.name: Smoke Bomb
choices.description: Unlocks Smoke Bomb — blind all nearby enemies for 2 turns.

choices.name: Disarm Trap
choices.description: Unlocks Disarm Trap — safely remove traps from chests. Class-defining utility.

choices.name: Envenom
choices.description: Unlocks Envenom — poison strike dealing sustained damage over time.

choices.name: Vanish
choices.description: Unlocks Vanish — become untargetable for 1 turn for repositioning.

choices.name: Death Mark
choices.description: Unlocks Death Mark — brand target for double damage on next hit. Requires Envenom.

choices.name: Shadow Step
choices.description: Unlocks Shadow Step — teleport and deal backstab damage. Requires Vanish.
